claim: Neuralink has expanded from 1 human patient to over 20 patients with brain implants
actionable: Track Neuralink clinical trials and patient outcomes to understand BCI progress and regulatory pathway
source_title: Neuralink's DJ Seo: Inside the Race to Connect Brains and AI

claim: AI will eventually become an exocortex layered above the human neocortex as a system for augmenting cognition
actionable: Consider how LLMs could serve as cognitive extensions; design interfaces assuming future brain-AI integration rather than keyboard/mouse
source_title: Neuralink's DJ Seo: Inside the Race to Connect Brains and AI

claim: The real technical ceiling for BCIs is direct, uncompressed, multimodal transfer of concepts between minds and machines
actionable: Frame BCI capabilities in terms of bandwidth and fidelity rather than specific motor outputs; measure progress by concept transfer rate
source_title: Neuralink's DJ Seo: Inside the Race to Connect Brains and AI

claim: Vertical integration from device design through manufacturing is essential for scalable BCI deployment, not just the implant itself
actionable: When building hardware-AI products, invest in controlling the full supply chain and manufacturing infrastructure from day one
source_title: Neuralink's DJ Seo: Inside the Race to Connect Brains and AI

claim: Elon uses aggressive, all-green-light scheduling as a first-principles engineering tool, not arbitrary management tactic—stripping away assumed bottlenecks reveals 80-90% of delays are man-made
actionable: When facing a deadline, ask what the raw physics/biology allows; remove every assumed constraint one at a time and measure actual bottlenecks
source_title: Neuralink's DJ Seo: Inside the Race to Connect Brains and AI
